title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 13 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 13 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 13 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/08/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures held up well during the session but dived at the close. The most-traded contract I2601 eventually closed at 795,unchanged from yesterday. Traders' willingness to sell was moderate; steel mills restocked on demand.
